User added:
"In Him [and in fellowship with one another] you yourselves also are being built up [into this structure] with the rest, to form a fixed abode (dwelling place) of God in (by, through) the Spirit."
‭‭Ephesians‬ ‭2:22‬ ‭AMPC‬‬‬‬‬‬

The Spirit of God works individually in each of us, and corporately in the church, to bring both into the likeness of Christ Jesus, so that He is glorified in and through us. Like a great orchestra of saints past, present, and future, we all have a certain time to play, guided by the Great Conductor's hand. And if we humble ourselves individually, as we do together, He will show us how to play our best.

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
Trevor:

(part 2)

I don't always get it right, but Im growing. The only way to know if you have heard from God is to step out and expect to see fruit happen. 

Sometimes God speaks to me through words of Knowledge for physical healing. This is how it happens. I actually feel pain that isn't mine in a certain part of my body and that's how I know God wants me to heal someone who has that pain. It only lasts for a few seconds, but when it happens I know I should go and find that person. I have seen this happen multiple times and God has healed the person that I find right there on the spot.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine God meeting you in your despair with an adventure like this, His Holy Spirit "Washing" over you. You are "His Baby".
